spec.title: Grafana — Self Monitoring
spec.description: Health, performance and errors for Grafana itself: HTTP traffic & latency, process CPU/memory, database pool, backing-datasource health, the alerting engine, auth, and Go runtime. Filter by job/instance.

spec.title: Uptime
spec.description: Time since the Grafana process started.

spec.title: HTTP req/s
spec.description: Total HTTP requests per second across all handlers.

spec.title: 5xx error ratio
spec.description: Share of HTTP responses with 5xx status.

spec.title: File descriptors used
spec.description: Open file descriptors as a percentage of the process limit.

spec.title: Connection wait time rate
spec.description: Rate of cumulative time spent waiting for a DB connection (saturation signal).

spec.title: Scheduler behind
spec.description: How far behind schedule the alert evaluator is. Should stay near 0.
